basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) has released the official Professor of Practice Notification 2026 at its official website. Has been announced under the BITS Pilani Professor of Practice Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged minimum 45 years with a qualification of Master’s degree in engineering, science, humanities or related field (PhD desirable) or Bachelor’s degree with exceptional achievements in entrepreneurship/start-ups can apply offline Before 15 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application form download link are available below.

qualification.details: Master’s degree in engineering, science, humanities or a related field (PhD desirable not essential); or Bachelor’s degree with exceptional achievements in entrepreneurship and start-ups

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Professor of Practice Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Professor of Practice recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the BITS Pilani Professor of Practice recruitment is 15 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Professor of Practice position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Professor of Practice position is 45 years.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for the Professor of Practice role?
faq.answer: The job type for the Professor of Practice role is contract-based.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Professor of Practice post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Master’s degree in engineering, science, humanities, or a related field. A PhD is desirable but not essential. Alternatively, a Bachelor’s degree with exceptional achievements in entrepreneurship and start-ups is also accepted.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the Professor of Practice position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Campus Level Review committee.

faq.question: Q8. Where is BITS Pilani located?
faq.answer: BITS Pilani is located in Pilani, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates apply through online mode?
faq.answer: No, the application process for this recruitment is strictly offline.
